title: Studying at Home
content: Jacob spent the evening studying at home for an important exam. He organized his books and notes neatly on the kitchen table before starting. Outside, rain hit the windows softly while he reviewed difficult chapters. Sometimes he became distracted and checked his phone, but he quickly returned to his studies. Around nine o’clock, Jacob prepared tea and took a short break. Although studying was tiring, he felt proud of his progress. He hoped all the hard work would help him pass the exam successfully next week.
